channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Juan Soto sends the Yankees to the World Series for the first time in 15 years
item.description: Juan Soto hit a three-run home run on Saturday to bring the American League pennant back to the Bronx for the first time since 2009.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CMU def. New Mexico Highlands 21-10 in homecoming game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—In the second quarter, with the game tied at zero, the Cowboys sought to break the deadlock. Joey Cave handed the ball off to Mike Jones, who found space after strong blocking from his teammates.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Texas TD against Georgia 2 plays after interception 1st wiped out by penalty and trash on field
item.description: Texas fans littered the north end of the field with water bottles and other trash after an interception for the top-ranked Longhorns against No. 5 Georgia was initially wiped out by a pass-interference penalty before officials changed the call.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Olympian to drug lord: Snowboarder accused of running drug ring
item.description: Wedding competed for Canada in the 2002 Winter Olympics in Salt Lake City; according to the official Olympics website, he finished 24th in the parallel giant slalom event.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: Tennessee upsets Alabama in SEC thriller; second loss of season puts Crimson Tide's playoff hopes in jeopardy
item.description: The Tennessee Volunteers and head coach Josh Heupel earned what many would consider a statement win on Saturday when they upset Alabama.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CMU inducts BJ Russell into the Hall of Honor
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado Mesa University recently honored two former athletes, linebacker BJ Russell and volleyball setter Jordyn Moody, for their outstanding contributions to CMU athletics.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Norris on pole for US Grand Prix after Verstappen wins sprint race as they restart F1 title fight
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — McLaren’s Lando Norris edged Red Bull’s Max Verstappen for the pole at the United States Grand Prix on Saturday as Formula 1 returned from its autumn break with those two resuming their fight for the drivers’ season championship.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cam Ward throws for 4 touchdowns, No. 6 Miami survives Louisville comeback bids for wild 52-45 win
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky. (AP) — Cam Ward's offensive line gave him plenty of time to throw on some big plays. On others, he created the extra time he needed to find his target on his own. The combination kept No. 6 Miami ahead and eventually created opportunities for teammates to win a shootout to remember.
item.dc:creator: GARY B. GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Christian Barmore apologizes to Rhode Island police after racism remarks
item.description: Patriots defensive tackle Christian Barmore issued an apology on social media to the Providence Police Department after he accused officers of racism during a recent traffic stop.
item.dc:creator: Raymond Baccari, NewsNation

item.title: Djokovic tops Nadal before Sinner beats Alcaraz for the title at the Six Kings Slam exhibition
item.description: Jannik Sinner beat Carlos Alcaraz for the championship in the Six Kings Slam exhibition event after Novak Djokovic topped Rafael Nadal for third place in what might have been the final match in one of tennis' great rivalries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: No. 16 Indiana routs Nebraska 56-7 to stay unbeaten; Rourke injures hand and misses 2nd half
item.description: BLOOMINGTON, Ind. (AP) — Justice Ellison ran for 105 yards and two first-half touchdowns and No. 16 Indiana continued its best start in 57 years with a 56-7 rout of Nebraska on Saturday, matching the Hoosiers' most lopsided Big Ten win in program history.
item.dc:creator: PHILLIP B. WILSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Yankees squander lead, bounce back to take 3-1 advantage over Cleveland in ALCS
item.description: Emmanuel Clase continued his postseason struggles, as the New York Yankees rallied in the ninth - they are now one win away from making the World Series.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alonso and Mets extend season again, beating Dodgers 12-6 to send NLCS back to LA for Game 6
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Not easy to knock out these New York Mets. Pete Alonso golfed an early three-run homer and the Mets hammered an ineffective Jack Flaherty, extending the National League Championship Series with a 12-6 victory over the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mets extend season again, beating Dodgers 12-6 to send NLCS back to LA for Game 6
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pete Alonso golfed an early three-run homer, and the New York Mets hammered an ineffective Jack Flaherty, extending the National League Championship Series with a 12-6 victory over the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Guardians starting Tanner Bibee in Game 5 against Yankees after short outing earlier in ALCS
item.description: Tanner Bibee is getting a second crack at the Yankees in the AL Championship Series. His first one didn't go so well. The right-hander will start for the Cleveland Guardians in Game 5 on Saturday after he was pulled from Game 2 in the second inning by manager Stephen Vogt.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake aims for a strong finish to regular season while honoring midfield hero Matt Crooks
item.description: Real Salt Lake (3-West, 56 points) closes out the regular season against Vancouver Whitecaps FC (8-West, 47 points) at America First Field in Sandy on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Broncos dominate Saints in Payton's return to New Orleans
item.description: For all four quarters. For all 60 minutes. The Denver Broncos were in complete control of the Saints.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: San Diego Wave FC gets new ownership after historic sale finalized
item.description: Seven months after it was first reported San Diego Wave FC would be getting new ownership, the National Women's Soccer League club announced on Thursday it was officially sold.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Anaheim knocks off Utah in overtime, 5-4
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) - After winning two overtime games to begin its first road trip, the Utah Hockey Club closed out the trip with an overtime loss.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cole Kmet earns NFC Special Teams Player of the Week honors
item.description: Cole Kmet was named NFC Special Teams Player of the Week for Week 6 after successfully snapping on all five of the Bears' point-after attempts during their game in London against the Jacksonville Jaguars.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Montrose volleyball picks up huge league win over Fruita
item.description: It took all five sets to decide a battle between two of the Southwestern League's best on the volleyball court.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Bucs with Bowles looks back at hurricane worries and one big win
item.description: Buccaneers Head Coach Todd Bowles stayed up most of the night last Wednesday into Thursday morning watching Hurricane Milton consume the Tampa Bay area with damaging high winds, torrential rain, and flood waters claiming spots that had barely begun recovery from Hurricane Helene less than two weeks
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: North Carolina football player dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: UNC had honored Tylee Craft, 23, during Saturday's game. Coach Mack Brown, however, said he hadn't learned of Craft's death until after the game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Pro rider Cam Zink breaks ribs in hard fall during Red Bull Rampage mountain biking competition
item.description: Pro mountain biker Cameron Zink suffered six broken ribs and a punctured lung after a hard crash at Red Bull Rampage -- a particularly challenging freeride competition -- in southern Utah on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: AP Top 25: Oregon, Penn State move behind No. 1 Texas. Army, Navy both ranked for 1st time since '60
item.description: Oregon and Penn State each moved up a spot in The Associated Press college football poll on Sunday following thrilling wins in high-profile games, and Top 25 newcomers Navy and Army are in the rankings together for the first time since 1960.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, Fox 5
